allow: PowerShell($p = Get-Content "D:\\AI 실습\\클로드 코드\\DONE\\node_modules\\postcss-import\\package.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "postcss-import: $\($p.version\)"; $r = Get-Content "D:\\AI 실습\\클로드 코드\\DONE\\node_modules\\resolve\\package.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "resolve: $\($r.version\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\AI 실습\\클로드 코드\\DONE\\node_modules" -Recurse -Filter "package.json" -Depth 3 | ForEach-Object { try { $j = Get-Content $_.FullName -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json -ErrorAction Stop; if \($j.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'version' -and [string]::IsNullOrEmpty\($j.version\)\) { $_.FullName } } catch {} } | Select-Object -First 20)
